## Preview URL
<!-- Vercel posts this automatically — paste it here too for clarity -->
`https://mohe-web-git-[your-branch]-flowbond.vercel.app`

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature or page
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] content — copy / text update
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code change, no feature/fix
- [ ] chore — build, deps, config

## Testing done
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Reviewed on preview URL (link above)
- [ ] Mobile looks correct
- [ ] No console errors

## Architectural decisions
<!-- If you introduced a new pattern, component, or structure — document it here so the other Claude instance picks it up on next context load -->

## Multi-sig checklist
- [ ] Branch is from `dev`, not `main`
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used (`feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Reviewer has checked the **preview URL** before approving

> **If this is a `dev → main` PR:** Both @stephferrera and @Cavino must approve before merging to production.
